name: holacracy
description: Engage with Holacracy from inside Claude — actor- and role-aware AI co-pilots for the four Core Roles (Facilitator, Secretary, Lead Link, Rep Link), a governance-aware operating frame, proactive tension capture with a draft-and-confirm GlassFrog filing flow (subagent + slash commands for capturing, processing the inbox, and supersession sweeping), and a conditional SessionStart briefing for scheduled role routines. Pairs with the GlassFrog MCP connector.
